title: Kidnapping, Caucasian Style
writer: Leonid Gaidai, Yakov Kostyukovskiy, Moris Slobodskoy
actors: Aleksandr Demyanenko, Natalya Varley, Vladimir Etush
plot: A young student Shurik comes to a remote mountainous region in search of ancient legends and traditions. Fooled by the corrupt local governor, he helps him to kidnap a beautiful young girl, but soon realizes what he's done.
